name: Claude Code Runner
description: Uses Claude Agent SDK as a local provider — delegates all reasoning, tool use, and file editing to the SDK.

port.description: Port for the local bridge server

maxTurns.description: Max agentic turns per request (safety cap, default: 30)

queueMinDelayMs.description: Minimum delay between SDK queries in ms (default: 1000)

queueMaxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay between SDK queries in ms (default: 4000)

effort.description: Effort level: low, medium, high, max (default: medium)

tools.description: Allowed tools list (default: all claude_code tools)
